title: Link-Bearing Elements, Relations, Base URLs, and Crawl Graph
description: Only anchor tags are inspected, every href becomes a page, relation and base semantics disappear, and fetched URL sets stand in for a graph. Learners cumulatively produce semantic provenance-rich link graph through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, embedded, form, media, and alternate URL-bearing HTML elements.
Use first valid base semantics against final response URL and retain accepted and rejected base evidence.
Interpret rel tokens, canonical, alternate, hreflang, download, media, nofollow, and target under explicit owner policy.
